label: Keyframe animation part
description: A per-node animation part driven by discrete keyframes. Each Keyframe specifies the position offset, rotation angle, scale, and optional graphic state at a given tick. Default worker is AnimationWorker_Keyframes.

keyframes.label: Keyframes
keyframes.description: Ordered list of keyframes for this node. The worker interpolates between them over the animation's durationTicks.
